title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 11–13, this part focuses on Unknown person #10, Bonney, Unknown person #11, Unknown person #12, Kuma as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What is this stupid mess?! There is no way Kuma could come here...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Shoot him!! It doesn't matter, just stop him!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The life you fought so hard to give me has...
